title: The Gehring Lemma in Metric Spaces
summary:
We present a proof for the Gehring lemma in a metric measure space endowed
with a doubling measure. As an application we show the self improving property
of Muckenhoupt weights.

title: Decay for the wave and Schroedinger evolutions on manifolds with conical   ends, Part I
comment:
32 pages, This paper differs in terms of both generalizations and
  improvement of the exposition from the paper "Decay estimates for the
  Schroedinger evolution on asymptotically conic surfaces of revolution, Part
  I", and is therefore posted as a new paper
summary:
Global in time dispersive estimates for the Schroedinger and wave evolutions
are obtained on manifolds with conical ends whose Hamiltonian flow exhibits
trapping. This paper deals with the case of initial data with "zero angular
momentum".

title: Decay for the wave and Schroedinger evolutions on manifolds with conical   ends, Part II
summary:
Global in time dispersive estimates for the Schroedinger and wave evolutions
are obtained on manifolds with conical ends whose Hamiltonian flow exhibits
trapping. This paper deals with the case of initial data with fixed "nonzero
angular momentum".

title: Well-posedness of the Fifth Order Kadomtsev-Petviashvili I Equation in   Anisotropic Sobolev Spaces with Nonnegative Indices
summary:
In this paper we establish the local and global well-posedness of the real
valued fifth order Kadomstev-Petviashvili I equation in the anisotropic Sobolev
spaces with nonnegative indices. In particular, our local well-posedness
improves Saut-Tzvetkov's one and our global well-posedness gives an affirmative
answer to Saut-Tzvetkov's $L^2$-data conjecture.
